sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 맥케슨은 2026 회계연도 매출 4,034억 달러를 기록하며 견조한 성장세를 보였고, 2027 회계연도 조정 EPS 가이던스를 43.80~44.60달러로 제시했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 2026 회계연도 연간 매출은 전년 대비 12% 증가한 4,034억 달러를 기록했습니다.
2026 회계연도 조정 주당순이익(EPS)은 39.11달러로 전년 대비 18% 증가하며 장기 성장 목표를 상회했습니다.
2027 회계연도 조정 EPS 가이던스를 43.80달러에서 44.60달러 범위로 제시하며 12~14%의 성장을 전망했습니다.

businessChanges.text: 유럽 사업부 매각 및 메디컬-서지컬 사업부 분할을 통해 포트폴리오 최적화를 지속하고 있습니다.
22억 5,000만 달러 규모의 가속 자사주 매입 프로그램을 시작했으며, 이사회는 50억 달러 규모의 자사주 매입 한도 증액을 승인했습니다.
종양학(Oncology) 및 바이오파마 서비스 등 고성장·고마진 분야에 대한 투자를 강화하고 있습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 4분기 매출은 963억 달러로 전년 동기 대비 6% 증가했습니다.
2026 회계연도 영업활동 현금흐름은 62억 달러, 잉여현금흐름은 54억 달러를 기록했습니다.
4분기 조정 주당순이익(EPS)은 11.69달러로 전년 동기 대비 16% 증가했습니다.

watchItems.text: 메디컬-서지컬 사업부 분할 진행 상황과 종양학 및 바이오파마 서비스 부문의 수익성 개선 여부를 확인할 필요가 있습니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 6 mck_exhibit991x3312026.htm EX-99.1 Document Exhibit 99.1 McKESSON REPORTS FISCAL 2026 FOURTH QUARTER AND FULL YEAR RESULTS, PROVIDES FISCAL 2027 GUIDANCE, AND REAFFIRMS LONG-TERM FINANCIAL GROWTH TARGETS IRVING, Texas, May 7, 2026 - McKesson Corporation (NYSE:MCK) today announced results for the fourth quarter and fiscal year ended March 31, 2026. Fourth Quarter Highlights: • Consolidated revenues of $96.3 billion increased 6%. • Earnings per diluted share of $13.71 increased $3.70. • Adjusted Earnings per Diluted Share of $11.69 increased 16%. • McKesson entered into a $2.25 billion accelerated share repurchase program. • McKesson's Board of Directors approved a $5.0 billion increase to the   Normalized numeric aliases: $96.3 billion = 963억 달러; $2.25 billion = 22억 5,000만 달러; $5.0 billion = 50억 달러; $7.7 billion = 77억 달러; $403.4 billion = 4,034억 달러; $96.3 = 96.3달러; $13.71 = 13.71달러; $3.70 = 3.70달러; $2.25 = 2.25달러; $11.69 = 11.69달러; $5.0 = 5.0달러; $7.7 = 7.7달러; $403.4 = 403.4달러.

• Earnings per diluted share of $38.38 increased $12.66. • Adjusted Earnings per Diluted Share of $39.11 increased 18%, above previously communicated long-range growth targets. • Cash flow from operations of $6.2 billion and Free Cash Flow of $5.4 billion. Outlook: • Establishing fiscal 2027 Adjusted Earnings per Diluted Share guidance range of $43.80 to $44.60, which indicates 12% to 14% forecasted growth compared to the prior year. • Reaffirming long-term Adjusted Earnings per Diluted Share growth target of 13% to 16%. • The Company does not forecast GAAP earnings per diluted share 1 . "McKesson's fourth quarter results reflect the strength of our diversified portfolio and disciplined execution against our strategic priorities. Our Fiscal 2026 performance, headlined by 12% revenue growth and 18  Normalized numeric aliases: $6.2 billion = 62억 달러; $5.4 billion = 54억 달러; $38.38 = 38.38달러; $12.66 = 12.66달러; $39.11 = 39.11달러; $6.2 = 6.2달러; $5.4 = 5.4달러; $43.80 = 43.80달러; $44.60 = 44.60달러.

consistently deliver growth and operating leverage across the enterprise," said Brian Tyler, chief executive officer. "We delivered significant progress - expanding specialty provider support, accelerating patient access through our scaled and integrated biopharma support services, and continuing to optimize our portfolio through the divestiture of Europe and the planned separation of our Medical-Surgical business. These accomplishments are a direct result of the talent and operational excellence of our employees, and I want to thank Team McKesson for their continued dedication throughout the year." "Looking ahead to fiscal 2027, we are well-positioned to build upon this momentum," said Mr. Tyler. "We remain committed to executing with discipline across the portfolio, investing in high-growth and high-margin areas in Oncology and Biopharma Services. By combining our operating execution

with a more focused and optimized portfolio, we will continue to deliver sustainable growth and create long-term value for our shareholders." 1 See below under "Fiscal 2027 Outlook" for full explanation Fiscal 2026 Fourth Quarter and Full Year Result Summary Fourth Quarter Full Year ($ in millions, except per share amounts) FY26 FY25 Change FY26 FY25 Change Revenues $ 96,295 $ 90,823 6 % $ 403,430 $ 359,051 12 % Net income attributable to McKesson Corporation 1,682 1,260 33 4,762 3,295 45 Adjusted Earnings 2 1,434 1,274 13 4,853 4,234 15   Normalized numeric aliases: $96.3 billion = 963억 달러; $96.3 = 96.3달러; 96,295 million = 962억 9,500만 달러; 90,823 million = 908억 2,300만 달러; 403,430 million = 4,034억 3,000만 달러; 359,051 million = 3,590억 5,100만 달러; 1,682 million = 16억 8,200만 달러; 1,260 million = 12억 6,000만 달러; 3,295 million = 32억 9,500만 달러; 4,762 million = 47억 6,200만 달러; 1,434 million = 14억 3,400만 달러; 1,274 million = 12억 7,400만 달러; 4,853 million = 48억 5,300만 달러; 4,234 million = 42억 3,400만 달러.

generation.costPolicy: Provider chain: Spark OAuth/free first, Gemini free second, approved DeepSeek v4 flash paid last on quota only.
